text:
Hi Sudeep,

Saw the Product + ML Staff Engineer posts on HN; reaching you direct as CEO since the angle below is more architecture-shaped than recruiting-shaped.

The positioning - "reliable structured outputs, and the observability to iterate on them" - lands on the layer I work on, and there's an angle worth surfacing (not a job application).

What I work on is the distributional read of model outputs - per-call alignment moments (rank ordering, score calibration, redundancy, bimodality) that catch silent drift before it shows up as user-visible failure. Most of the production audits I do have been text-side (RAG retrieval, agent tool-call cascades), but the same statistical method applies to vision-language outputs: the structured-output distribution has shape, and pathological shape is a leading indicator.

Three concrete patterns from text-side audits that I'd expect to map to your domain (chat.vlm.run, Orion, mm-ctx, vlmbench):

  - Per-frame / per-image alignment scores look fine in aggregate, but rank ordering of which frames the model rated highest is anti-correlated with what an oracle would pick. Mean alignment passes; rank inversion is the failure.

  - Multi-step visual reasoning cascade where each step passes its check individually, but the composition drifts the working visual context into a distribution shape the model wasn't validated against. Final answer is coherent, factually drifted.

  - Score calibration drift between the structured-output confidence and ground-truth correctness, accumulating silently as the model handles more prompt variants.

I built a set of OSS sensors for this layer. Public teardown of the LangChain RAG quickstart shows what the analysis looks like (5 of 6 queries flagged - retrieval-side rather than vision-side, but same statistical method):

https://github.com/kevin-luddy39/contrarianAI/tree/main/tools/retrieval-auditor/examples/langchain-quickstart-teardown

Honest disclosure: my sensors are text-side; vision-side adaptation is TBD. If there's interest, the conversation is partnership-shaped (does this method add signal to vlmbench / Orion telemetry?) and exploratory rather than a sales pitch. Free 30-min if useful. If now isn't right, no follow-up from me.

Kevin Luddy
contrarianAI
